title: NoMineCrafterGriefing
description: A little tweak that prevents you from blowing up your own MineCrafter by mistake.
body:
# NoMineCrafterGriefing
A little tweak that prevents you from blowing up your own MineCrafter by mistake, and prevents as much as possible from destroying your game progress, works on 25w14craftmine.
#### Before
![MineCrafter has been destroyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f14f479c0ac77c801cd38774a7c9284668bc205c_0.webp)
#### After
![MineCrafter survived the explosion.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2242bc091005da6cd58a702da977e4821ffff5a_0.webp)
